notes: I have experience in Java development and unit testing.
applicantDescription: I have completed multiple Java projects and I am familiar with software testing practices. I can support lab sessions effectively.

notes: I have experience with UML and design patterns.
applicantDescription: I have worked on several software design projects using UML diagrams and design patterns. I can help students understand these concepts.
I have experience in full-stack development and software testing. I am passionate about helping students learn software engineering practices.

notes: Experienced with Python and Git workflows.
applicantDescription: I have contributed to open-source projects and have experience with Git workflows. I can help students with version control and code review.
I have taken advanced software engineering courses and have practical experience with software design documentation.
I can help students debug their code and understand Python programming concepts. I am available during weekday afternoons.
